ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary – Confirmation and Boarding Details
ham.body:
Dear Jane Doe,

Thank you for booking with GlobalAir. Here are the details of your upcoming flight:

• Flight: GA1234
• Date: 2026-05-15
• Departure: 08:45 AM from JFK International Airport (Gate A12)
• Arrival: 11:30 AM at LAX International Airport
• Seat: 12B
• Baggage: 1 checked bag (23 kg) and 1 carry‑on bag (7 kg)

Please arrive at the airport at least 2 hours before departure. Check‑in will open at 06:45 AM.

If you need to modify your itinerary or add travel insurance, visit <URL>.

Safe travels!

Best regards,
GlobalAir Customer Service

---
This email was automatically generated. Please do not reply.

spam.subject: Urgent: Account Verification Required – IT Support Ticket #12345
spam.body:
Hello John,

Our security team has detected suspicious activity on your corporate email account. To protect your data and prevent potential compromise, we require you to verify your identity immediately.

Please click the link below to confirm your credentials:
<URL>

Failure to verify within 24 hours may result in temporary suspension of your account. If you believe this is a mistake, reply to this email with the phrase "Verify Account".

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Regards,
IT Support Team
Company Security
---
This message is part of ticket #12345. Do not reply to this email directly.
